overall.description: Third-person game footage showing a character in a red coat walking along a dark coastal shoreline at night. The character traverses sandy beaches, passes large rock formations, and explores rocky tidal pools under dim moonlight.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the water's edge where gentle waves meet the dark sand

entered.detail: calm sea with gentle waves lapping at the shore
wet black sand along the waterline
distant cliff formations along the coastline
clumps of seaweed scattered on the sand
massive boulder visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open beach at night, with ocean waves lapping at the dark sand on the left and patches of seaweed scattered along the shore on the right. The sky is dark and clear, with distant rocky cliffs visible ahead.

events.description: large rock formation approaches and dominates the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: navigating along the shoreline while approaching and passing a massive boulder on the right

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and walks past a large boulder formation that dominates the right side of the beach. The terrain remains sandy but becomes rockier as the character curves around the massive outcrop.

events.description: ground surface transitions from sand to rocky terrain with tidal pools

agents.ego_description: navigating through the rocky shoreline with tidal pools and uneven terrain

entered.detail: shallow pools of seawater among the dark rocks
weathered wooden log lying on the rocky shore

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a rockier section of the coast featuring tidal pools and layered rock formations. A piece of driftwood lies on the rocks to the right as the character continues exploring the rugged shoreline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dark coastal shoreline that transforms from an open sandy beach into a rugged, rocky terrain. It begins with the character walking beside ocean waves lapping at dark sand, passing scattered patches of seaweed under a clear night sky. As the character advances toward distant cliffs, the path curves around a massive boulder formation that dominates the right side of the beach. The terrain then shifts from soft sand to a more jagged landscape, leading the character into a section of layered rock formations and tidal pools. Finally, the camera follows the character past a piece of driftwood as they continue exploring the increasingly rugged shoreline.
